title: fix(deps): update module github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22 to v22.7.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd) | `v22.6.0` → `v22.7.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcoreos%2fgo-systemd%2fv22/v22.7.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcoreos%2fgo-systemd%2fv22/v22.6.0/v22.7.0?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>coreos/go-systemd (github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22)</summary>

### [`v22.7.0`](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/releases/tag/v22.7.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/compare/v22.6.0...v22.7.0)

This release fixes an issue with multiple calls to (e.g.) StopUnit, simplifies and improves code and documentation, and adds a few new methods.

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​473](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/473)
- Fixing error on negative value of LISTEN\_FDS by [@​vporoshok](https://redirect.github.com/vporoshok) in [#​472](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/472)
- Misc error reporting improvements by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​475](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/475)
- daemon: add `SdNotifyMonotonicUsec` helper function by [@​corhere](https://redirect.github.com/corhere) in [#​435](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/435)
- build(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 8 to 9 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​481](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/481)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​483](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/483)
- dbus: fix TestSetUnitProperties wrt systemd >= 252 by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​489](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/489)
- Sync repo templates ⚙ by [@​coreosbot-releng](https://redirect.github.com/coreosbot-releng) in [#​486](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/486)
- unit: simplify escape character by [@​huww98](https://redirect.github.com/huww98) in [#​485](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/485)
- machine1: add missing close method to conn. by [@​maartensson](https://redirect.github.com/maartensson) in [#​487](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/487)
- subscription: Added context cancellation and sync to subscription set by [@​NotSoFancyName](https://redirect.github.com/NotSoFancyName) in [#​480](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/480)
- ci: improvements by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​490](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/490)
- import1: add missing close method to conn by [@​maartensson](https://redirect.github.com/maartensson) in [#​492](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/492)
- sdjournal: fix copyrights by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​499](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/499)
- activation: simplify ListenersWithNames by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​498](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/498)
- dbus: allow multiple calls for the same unit to \*Unit by [@​haircommander](https://redirect.github.com/haircommander) in [#​496](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/496)
- Documentation nits by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​500](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/500)
- dbus: dedup result conversion code by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​493](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/493)
- add FilesWithNames() to activation by [@​MayCXC](https://redirect.github.com/MayCXC) in [#​497](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/497)
- Add support for transient units with auxiliary units by [@​gwenya](https://redirect.github.com/gwenya) in [#​495](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/495)
- activation: stub out for plan9 by [@​flokli](https://redirect.github.com/flokli) in [#​440](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/440)

#### New Contributors

- [@​vporoshok](https://redirect.github.com/vporoshok) made their first contribution in [#​472](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/472)
- [@​corhere](https://redirect.github.com/corhere) made their first contribution in [#​435](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/435)
- [@​huww98](https://redirect.github.com/huww98) made their first contribution in [#​485](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/485)
- [@​maartensson](https://redirect.github.com/maartensson) made their first contribution in [#​487](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/487)
- [@​haircommander](https://redirect.github.com/haircommander) made their first contribution in [#​496](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/496)
- [@​MayCXC](https://redirect.github.com/MayCXC) made their first contribution in [#​497](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/497)
- [@​gwenya](https://redirect.github.com/gwenya) made their first contribution in [#​495](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/495)
- [@​flokli](https://redirect.github.com/flokli) made their first contribution in [#​440](https://redirect.github.com/coreos/go-systemd/pull/440)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/coreos/go-systemd/compare/v22.6.0...v22.7.0>

</details>
